label: Now Developing
items: ICC rules April 22 on whether Duterte faces a full crimes-against-humanity trial — the most consequential Philippine legal date in decades.
Sara Duterte's probable cause hearings (April 14, 22, 29) converge with her father's ICC ruling in the same two-week window.
Marcos declared a national energy emergency (EO 110) — the Philippines is the first country to do so in the 2026 Middle East conflict, with oil stocks at 45 days and the peso past ₱60.
